task.en: In System Settings → Desktop & Dock (also called Dock & Menu Bar), apply ALL THREE of the following changes: (a) turn ON `Automatically hide and show the Dock`; (b) set `Position on screen` to `Left`; (c) drag the `Size` slider all the way to the left (smallest).

pre_command: defaults write com.apple.dock autohide -bool false; defaults write com.apple.dock orientation -string bottom; defaults write com.apple.dock tilesize -int 48; killall Dock 2>/dev/null; sleep 2
grading_command: killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; A=$(defaults read com.apple.dock autohide 2>/dev/null); [ "$A" = "1" ] && echo True || echo False
killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; O=$(defaults read com.apple.dock orientation 2>/dev/null); [ "$O" = "left" ] && echo True || echo False
killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; T=$(defaults read com.apple.dock tilesize 2>/dev/null); awk -v t="$T" 'BEGIN{exit !(t+0<=20)}' && echo True || echo False
